mapper.select: /** 수업상세 */ SELECT a.*, (SELECT COUNT(T.USER_ID) FROM t_lecture_stdnt T WHERE T.STATE in (1,2) AND T.EDU_SEQ = #{eduSeq} ) AS RCEPT_CNT, (SELECT ORG_NM FROM t_org T WHERE T.ORG_CD = a.ORG_CD) AS ORG_NM, 0 AS WAIT_CNT ,(select ctgry_nm from t_category where ctgry_seq = a.ctg1_seq) ctg1_nm ,(select ctgry_nm from t_category where ctgry_seq = a.ctg2_seq) ctg2_nm ,(select ctgry_nm from t_category where ctgry_seq = a.ctg3_seq) ctg3_nm FROM t_lecture a WHERE a.EDU_SEQ = #{eduSeq}
SELECT COUNT(USER_ID) FROM t_lecture_stdnt WHERE STATE != 3 AND EDU_SEQ = #{eduSeq}

SELECT a.* ,b.state pay_state ,b.pay_type ,b.amount pay_fee ,b.pg_pay_no FROM t_lecture_rcept a left join t_pay b on a.pay_no=b.pay_no WHERE a.EDU_SEQ = #{eduSeq} AND a.USER_ID = #{userId} AND a.rcept_seq = #{rceptSeq}
SELECT a.* ,b.state pay_state ,b.pay_type ,b.amount pay_fee ,b.pg_pay_no FROM t_lecture_rcept a left join t_pay b on a.pay_no=b.pay_no WHERE a.rcept_seq = #{rceptSeq}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM t_lecture_rcept WHERE EDU_SEQ = #{eduSeq} AND USER_ID = #{userId} and rcept_seq = #{rceptSeq}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_lecture_stdnt WHERE EDU_SEQ = #{eduSeq} AND STATE = 2
SELECT COUNT(EDU_SEQ) FROM t_lecture WHERE INSTRCTR_ID = #{userId}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM t_lecture_stdnt WHERE EDU_SEQ = #{eduSeq} AND USER_ID = #{userId}
mapper.select:
/** 수강자명단 카운트 */ SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_lecture_stdnt a left join t_user_info c on a.user_id =c.user_id WHERE a.EDU_SEQ = #{eduSeq} and a.state = 2
AND c.USER_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{srchWrd}, '%')
AND a.MOBILE LIKE CONCAT('%', #{srchWrd}, '%')
AND a.BELONG LIKE CONCAT('%', #{srchWrd}, '%')
mapper.update: UPDATE t_lecture_stdnt SET ATT_CNT = #{attCnt}, WORKSHOP_SCORE = #{workshopScore}, EXAM_SCORE = #{examScore}, ATTEND_SCORE = #{attendScore}, PASS_YN=#{passYn} WHERE EDU_SEQ = #{eduSeq} AND USER_ID = #{userId}
UPDATE t_lecture_stdnt SET PASS_CERT_NUM = #{passCertNum}, COMPL_CERT_NUM = #{complCertNum}, CERT_DE=#{certDe} WHERE EDU_SEQ = #{eduSeq} AND USER_ID = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM t_lecture_stdnt WHERE EDU_SEQ = #{eduSeq} and state in (2)
SELECT COUNT(EDU_SEQ) FROM t_lecture_stdnt WHERE USER_ID = #{userId}

SELECT T.* FROM ( SELECT A.EDU_SEQ, A.USER_ID, A.USER_NM, A.MOBILE, B.EDU_NM AS EMAIL, B.EDU_PERIOD_BEGIN AS BELONG, B.EDU_PERIOD_END AS POSITION, A.WORKSHOP_SCORE, A.EXAM_SCORE, A.PASS_YN, A.PASS_CERT_ISSUE, A.PASS_CERT_NUM, A.COMPL_CERT_ISSUE, A.COMPL_CERT_NUM FROM t_lecture_stdnt A, t_lecture B WHERE A.USER_ID = #{userId} AND A.EDU_SEQ = B.EDU_SEQ ORDER BY B.EDU_PERIOD_END DESC ) AS T LIMIT #{firstIndex}, #{row}

/** 관리자 > 신청 미니 리스트 */ SELECT a.EDU_SEQ, a.USER_ID, a.USER_NM, a.MOBILE, a.EMAIL, a.BELONG, a.POSITION, (SELECT b.EDU_NM FROM t_lecture b WHERE b.EDU_SEQ = a.EDU_SEQ) AS ETC, a.STATE, a.REG_DE, a.PAY_NO ,(select login_id from t_user_info where user_id=a.user_id) login_id FROM t_lecture_rcept a WHERE 1=1 AND a.state = 1
AND a.REG_DE >= TRUNC(NOW()) ORDER BY a.REG_DE DESC, a.USER_NM ASC LIMIT 0, #{row}

SELECT a.edu_seq ,a.user_id ,a.mobile ,a.email ,a.belong ,a.POSITION ,a.pay_type ,a.pay_yn ,a.etc ,a.state ,a.recpt_de ,a.pay_no ,a.file_org ,a.file_re ,a.pay_dt ,b.user_nm,b.login_id,b.birth FROM t_lecture_rcept a left join t_user_info b on a.user_id=b.user_id WHERE EDU_SEQ = #{eduSeq} ORDER BY STATE ASC, RECPT_DE DESC

SELECT a.edu_seq ,a.user_id ,a.mobile ,a.email ,a.belong ,a.POSITION ,a.workshop_score ,a.exam_score ,a.pass_yn ,a.pass_cert_issue ,a.pass_cert_num ,a.compl_cert_issue ,a.compl_cert_num ,a.survey_yn ,a.cert_de ,a.att_cnt ,b.reg_de ,c.birth,c.user_nm,c.login_id FROM t_lecture_stdnt a left join t_lecture_rcept b on a.edu_seq=b.edu_seq and a.user_id=b.user_id and a.rcept_seq = b.rcept_seq left join t_user_info c on a.user_id =c.user_id WHERE a.EDU_SEQ = #{eduSeq} ORDER BY a.USER_NM ASC
SELECT COUNT(USER_ID) FROM t_lecture_stdnt WHERE STATE = 1 AND EDU_SEQ = #{eduSeq}

SELECT COUNT(a.EDU_SEQ) FROM t_lecture a WHERE 1=1 AND ( a.INSTRCTR_ID = #{userId} or (a.edu_seq in (select edu_seq from t_lecture_time where check_id=#{userId})) )
AND ( a.edu_period_begin <= #{srchDate} and a.EDU_PERIOD_END >= #{srchDate} and a.CLOSE_YN!='Y' )
AND ( a.edu_period_begin > #{srchDate} and a.CLOSE_YN!='Y' )
AND a.EDU_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{srchWrd}, '%')
AND a.INSTRCTR_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{srchWrd}, '%')
AND a.ctg1_seq = #{srchCtgry}

/** 마이페이지 교육리스트 */ SELECT count(*) FROM t_lecture a left join (select * from t_lecture_stdnt where user_id=#{userId}) b on a.edu_seq=b.edu_seq WHERE 1=1
AND a.EDU_SEQ IN (SELECT EDU_SEQ FROM t_lecture_stdnt WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} and state = 2) AND ( #{srchDate} BETWEEN a.EDU_PERIOD_BEGIN and a.EDU_PERIOD_END and a.CLOSE_YN!='Y' )
AND a.EDU_SEQ IN (SELECT EDU_SEQ FROM t_lecture_rcept WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND state = 1) and b.user_id is null
AND a.EDU_SEQ IN (SELECT EDU_SEQ FROM t_lecture_stdnt WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} and state = 2)
AND a.EDU_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{srchWrd}, '%')
AND a.INSTRCTR_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{srchWrd}, '%')
AND a.ctg1_seq = #{srchCtgry}

/** eduSeq,userId로 기타항목 조회하기 */ select a.user_id ,a.edu_seq ,group_concat(etc_data separator ' | ') etc_data_01 from ( select a.user_nm ,a.user_id ,a.edu_seq ,b.etc_iem_seq ,concat(b.etc_iem_nm,' : ',c.etc_iem_data ) etc_data from t_lecture_rcept a left join t_lecture_etc_iem b on a.edu_seq =b.edu_seq left join t_lecture_etc_iem_data c on b.edu_seq =c.edu_seq and b.etc_iem_seq =c.etc_iem_seq and a.user_id =c.user_id where
(a.edu_seq,a.user_id) in
(#{item.eduSeq},#{item.userId})
1!=1
order by b.etc_iem_seq ) a group by a.user_nm ,a.user_id ,a.edu_seq
